prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HAWK-SLFHEALMAT-BL-12 Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Universal Hobby Existing Title: DIY Craft Self Healing Cutting Mat Art Supply Tool 9 x 12 Inch Black Description: The ToolTreaux self-healing cutting mat is a hobby and craft essential for any DIY workspace. Designed to heal on its own, the mat's surface is made from separate tiny pieces of materials to create a solid surface for you to cut on. Your cutting tool or blade will go between these tiny pieces to separate them instead of cutting into the surface of the mat. This durable, flexible material will prevent slippage during use.

Each board features a built-in degree angle and grid layout guide to assist with tracing, folding, sewing, gift-wrapping, and more with precision and accuracy. The grid comes with both imperial and metric measurements so it will be compatible with most patterns and hobby crafts.

These mats are ideal for preventing damage to your counter, work table, desktop, or crafting area. The surface will absorb cuts while also preventing your cutting tools and utility blades from dulling.

Measuring just 9" x 12", these mats are great for smaller workspaces. They will easily fit inside toolboxes, craft kits, and storage supplies when not in use. Use them for precision cutting and designing with ease in your next craft and hobby project. Search Terms: self healing cutting mat for sewing craft mat craft organizers and storage supplies table materials kit cutting board plastic small cutting boards mat set utility knife blades razor blades hobbies for women scrapbooking supplies kit paper DIY kits Features: - SELF-HEALING CUTTING MAT - Surface of the ToolTreaux cutting mat heals on its own; cuts, slices, and dices will leave no marks. Manufactured from separate tiny pieces to create a solid surface to cut on, will prevent the board from slipping during use - PRECISION GRID LAY OUT - Cutting board comes with a built-in grid and angle guide for tracing, sewing, folding, gift wrapping, and more with accuracy and precision. Grid features both imperial and metric measurements - PROTECT YOUR WORKSPACE - Cutting mat is designed to prevent damage to your work table, kitchen counter, desktop, or crafting area. Surface will absorb cuts and prevents your cutting tools from dulling - COMPACT SIZE - Mat measures 9" x 12", ideal for small workspaces. Use for precision cutting and designing with ease. Flexible material, easy to store in a toolbox or craft supplies kit when not in use - SPECIFICATIONS - Color: black; Dimensions: 9" x 12"; Thickness: .08"; Weight: .26oz; Material: self-healing surface; Measurements: imperial and metric === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Hobby 9 x 12 Inch Black Self-Healing Cutting Mat

openai.item_name: Universal Hobby 9 x 12 in Black Self Healing Cutting Mat

anthropic.title_differentiation: Self-Healing Surface, Grid And Angle Guide, Imperial And Metric Measurements, Protects Workspace, Compact 9X12 Design

openai.title_differentiation: Imperial And Metric Grid, Degree Angle Guide, Non-Slip Surface, Protects Tables, Compact 9 X 12 Inch
